column1: # PhotonPass custom partition table — Seeed XIAO ESP32S3 Plus (8 MB flash)
#   nvs      20 KB  — ESP-IDF non-volatile storage (WiFi credentials etc
#                      radios are disabled; kept because the Arduino SDK expects it)
#   otadata   8 KB  — OTA slot selector (required even with a single app slot)
#   dmz       5 MB  — encrypted backup LittleFS (mounted only on explicit request)
# Offsets must be 4 KB-aligned; app partitions must start on a 64 KB boundary.
